source_intent.raw_intent: Case 039: I am a enterprise_compliance_lead in Latin America. Build a srx_ace_workflow for compliance_evidence using the market_lens. Chaos input type is high_urgency_low_context. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Build an SRX ACE workflow for compliance evidence collection and validation, tailored for a Latin American enterprise compliance lead, using the market_lens to handle high-urgency, low-context inputs with explicit validation gates. Scope: - The workflow ingests messy, high-urgency compliance evidence requests (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria), processes them through structured validation gates, and produces a governed artifact compilable by SR8 into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. Constraints: - Must operate within Latin American regulatory frameworks (e.g., LGPD, GDPR alignment, local data sovereignty). - All evidence must pass explicit validation gates before acceptance. - Workflow must handle ambiguous or incomplete inputs without halting. - Output must be SR8-compilable with strict JSON schema adherence. - No execution of legal, financial, or compliance advice; only workflow orchestration. Success Criteria: - Workflow processes at least 10 high-urgency, low-context inputs without failure. - Each input is routed through at least 3 validation gates (context completeness, regulatory match, evidence quality). - Final artifact includes all SR8-required sections: objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract. - Validation gates produce explicit pass/fail logs for audit. Output Contract: - type: srx_ace_workflow - sections: objective; scope; constraints; success_criteria; output_contract - format: strict JSON - validation_gates: gate_1_context_completeness; gate_2_regulatory_match; gate_3_evidence_quality - audit_trail: True
